scripts.build: npm run build -w @proxy-platform/shared && npm run build -w @proxy-platform/db && npm run build -w @proxy-platform/api && npm run build -w @proxy-platform/gateway && npm run build -w @proxy-platform/worker && npm run build -w @proxy-platform/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/shared && npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/db && npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/api && npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/gateway && npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/worker && npm run typecheck -w @proxy-platform/web
